ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group ID */,
  "trial_date" TEXT /* Date of the trial */,
  "test_day" INTEGER /* Test day number */,
  "trapped_pig_uniq_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the trapped pig */,
  "pot_helper_uniq_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the pot helper pig */,
  "test_subj_opens_testbox" INTEGER /* Number of times the test subject opens the test box */,
  "test_subj_opens_emptybox_to20" INTEGER /* Number of times the test subject opens the empty box (up to 20 times) */,
  "sep_rate_open_anybox" REAL /* Rate of opening any box */,
  "daily_test_order_within_group" INTEGER /* Order of the test within the day for the group */,
  "group_test_order" INTEGER /* Order of the group test */,
  "related" TEXT /* Indicates if the pigs are related */,
  "trapped_before" TEXT /* Indicates if the pig was trapped before */,
  "location_test_box" TEXT /* Location of the test box */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations made during the trial */,
  "trial_environment" TEXT /* Description of the environment where the trial was conducted */,
  "trial_stimulus" TEXT /* Description of any stimuli used during the trial */,
  "trial_duration_in_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the trial in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_trapped_pig_uniq_id FOREIGN KEY ("trapped_pig_uniq_id") REFERENCES pigs ("pig_uniq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_pot_helper_uniq_id FOREIGN KEY ("pot_helper_uniq_id") REFERENCES pigs ("pig_uniq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the group is housed */,
  "group_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the group */,
  "group_size" INTEGER /* Number of pigs in the group */,
  "group_gender_ratio" TEXT /* Ratio of male to female pigs in the group */,
  "group_formation_date" TEXT /* Date when the group was formed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pigs" (
  "pig_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pig */,
  "pig_uniq_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the pig (e.g., DG2_F_2) */,
  "pig_name" TEXT /* Name of the pig */,
  "pig_sex" TEXT /* Sex of the pig (Male/Female) */,
  "pig_sow" INTEGER /* Sow number of the pig */,
  "pig_birthday" TEXT /* Birthday of the pig */,
  "pig_weight" REAL /* Weight of the pig in kg */,
  "pig_breed" TEXT /* Breed of the pig */,
  "pig_health_status" TEXT /* Current health status of the pig */,
  "pig_behavioral_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the pig's behavior */,
  "pig_genetic_info" TEXT /* Genetic information or lineage of the pig */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pig_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "behavioral_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of behavioral metrics */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial ID */,
  "famil_rate_open_anybox" REAL /* Rate of opening any box by family members */,
  "dur_look_testwindow_s" REAL /* Duration the pig looks at the test window (in seconds) */,
  "rate_look_testwindow_s_per_min" REAL /* Rate of looking at the test window per minute */,
  "prop_look_test_window" REAL /* Proportion of time the pig looks at the test window */,
  "dur_look_emptywindow_s" REAL /* Duration the pig looks at the empty window (in seconds) */,
  "rate_look_emptywindow_s_per_min" REAL /* Rate of looking at the empty window per minute */,
  "prop_look_emptywindow" REAL /* Proportion of time the pig looks at the empty window */,
  "lat_helped_min" REAL /* Latency to help in minutes */,
  "sep_numtimes_open_testbox" INTEGER /* Number of times the pig opens the test box */,
  "sep_numtimes_open_emptybox" INTEGER /* Number of times the pig opens the empty box */,
  "sep_rate_open_testbox_permin" REAL /* Rate of opening the test box per minute */,
  "sep_rate_open_emptybox_permin" REAL /* Rate of opening the empty box per minute */,
  "famil_rate_curio_min" REAL /* Rate of curiosity in minutes */,
  "total_interactions" INTEGER /* Total number of interactions with other pigs during the trial */,
  "interaction_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of interactions with other pigs (in seconds) */,
  "aggression_level" INTEGER /* Level of aggression observed (1-5 scale) */,
  "social_hierarchy" TEXT /* Position in the social hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_behavioral_metrics_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_details" (
  "details_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial detail */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial ID */,
  "test_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "test_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  "trial_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trial in seconds */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Specific location within the test area */,
  "test_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the test was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("details_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_details_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for quick contact */,
  "user_education" TEXT /* Educational background of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the trial */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the trial was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the trial was accessed */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_compositions" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group composition */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group ID */,
  "pig_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pig ID */,
  "role_in_group" TEXT /* Role of the pig in the group (e.g., leader, follower) */,
  "composition_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the group composition */,
  "composition_date" TEXT /* Date when the composition was recorded or changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_compositions_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_compositions_pig_id FOREIGN KEY ("pig_id") REFERENCES pigs ("pig_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial ID */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was added */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., observation, suggestion) */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_comments_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group ID */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_text" TEXT /* Text of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., activity, change) */,
  "log_status" TEXT /* Status of the log entry (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_logs_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)
